title: I NEED INFORMATION

posts.author: Edgar14 (EDGAR YANEZ)
posts.cookedHtml: My first time here on the forum. I am a new monday user and I need to know how to link the cost cells of a subitem with that of its parent task. I explain; In a main task I have a cell that indicates cost but that task has 4 subitems with cost cells. In each cost cell of the subitems I specify $10 that means that in the cost cell of the parent task $40 should appear but that doesn’t happen automatically and I don’t know how to do it. Can someone tell me how to achieve that please?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Edgar,

Welcome to the community!. We have developed an app called Rollup Subitems that is currently under review by the monday.com marketplace team. This video RMB and RSI video.mp4 on Vimeo explains the use of this app (starting at 16:20). Let us know if that solves your use case.

If you are only looking for a visual representation of that $40 in the parent item you can click the settings of the costs column in your subitems and select “Show summary at parent”

posts.author: Edgar14 (EDGAR YANEZ)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you very much. I set the Show sumary, it works!. Thank you!
